vBRIEFInfo.author: agent:deft-directive-build
vBRIEFInfo.description: Cancelled scope vBRIEF for the Lean Angle premium feature (audit trail)

narratives.Overview: Premium Lean Angle feature for MotoSpeedy: a real-time, rear-axial motorcycle indicator tilting with the bike, a signed live lean angle in degrees from vertical, and per-session max-left/max-right tracking, gated behind a lifetime in-app purchase (force-unlocked during testing).
narratives.Outcome: Cancelled. The feature was fully implemented on branch feat/lean-angle and proposed in PR #9 (https://github.com/rockbox37/cursorSpeedometer/pull/9), but never merged to main. Per a product decision the feature was removed before reaching the shipping app; PR #9 was closed without merge and the branch deleted. No lean-angle code exists on main.
narratives.Reflection: Implementation (LeanAngleEngine, LeanAngleService, LeanAngleEntitlementStore, LeanAngleViewModel, LeanAngleView, AppSettings persistence, ride/settings integration, and LeanAngleEngineTests) is preserved in the closed PR #9 history if the feature is ever revived. This vBRIEF is retained in vbrief/cancelled/ as the audit trail for that decision.
narratives.Lessons: Track features through the Deft vBRIEF lifecycle from the start so cancellation is a clean state transition rather than ad-hoc branch cleanup.

items.title: Lean angle feature implementation (engine, sensor, entitlement, view model, UI, tests)

references.title: PR #9: Add Lean Angle premium feature (closed without merge)
